manageDesc: ChanoX2 can automatically identify game types and organize your collection by technology, size, or playtime. ChanoX2 gives you the fine-grained control you need.
featureAutoDetectDesc: Supports Unity, Unreal, Godot, Ren'Py and more
featureSmartLibraryDesc: Auto-import your games and keep them organized with tags.
featurePerformanceDesc: Zero-overhead launcher that closes itself when game starts.
releaseDesc: Stable builds and assets from GitHub
communityDesc: ChanoX2 is open source and community-driven. Report bugs, feature requests, or just come say hi.
